executives.name: Andrew Grove
executives.background: Mr Grove has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including 22 years with Macquarie Bank in mining finance and 8 years in senior executive roles at African-focused gold producers. He has significant experience in project development, operations, and corporate finance.

executives.name: Ross Armstrong
executives.background: Mr Armstrong is a finance professional with over 20 years of experience in the resources sector. He has held senior financial roles in several ASX-listed companies and has extensive experience in financial management, corporate governance, and project financing.

board_of_directors.name: Phil Mitchell
board_of_directors.background: Mr Mitchell has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Rio Tinto and Anglo American. He has extensive experience in project development, operations, and corporate strategy.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Grove
board_of_directors.background: Mr Grove has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including 22 years with Macquarie Bank in mining finance and 8 years in senior executive roles at African-focused gold producers.

board_of_directors.name: Warren Mundine
board_of_directors.background: Mr Mundine is a prominent Australian businessman and political figure with extensive experience in the mining and resources sector, particularly in relation to Indigenous engagement and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: Patrick Mutz
board_of_directors.background: Mr Mutz has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on uranium mining and processing. He has held senior executive roles in several uranium companies in the US and Australia.
